title: Open and closed consultations
text:
Public consultations on various issues that affect Canadians. We invite you to learn more about our consultation activities and to participate and make your views known. 

 This section provides information on ongoing and past public consultations. 

 For a list of consultations currently under way in other federal departments, please visit the Government of Canada's Consulting with Canadians website. 

 Open consultations 
 Open - accepting input 
 -->

 There are no open consultations at this time. 

OPEN CONSULTATIONS GO HERE-->

 Information Bulletin on Transparency 
 Date closed: May 6, 2022 
 Date opened: March 8, 2022 

 Interested parties are invited to submit their comments through the online feedback form or by mail to the address below. Each submission received by the Bureau will be published on its website unless the provider specifically requests that it be kept confidential.

 Model timing agreement for mergers involving claimed efficiencies 
 Date closed: August 30, 2019 
 Date opened: July 16, 2019 

 The Competition Bureau invited interested parties to provide comments on a draft model timing agreement. The timing agreement is for the reviews of mergers that the merging parties claim will improve efficiencies and they would like the Commissioner of Competition to consider this before taking enforcement action. 

 Further reading 

 News release 
 Model timing agreement:

 Draft version 
 Final version (May 21, 2020)
